description: Welcome to Junction Creek! This FULLY DETACHED Whistler chalet-style townhome blends house-like space with strata ease. Bright open main floor boasts high ceilings, laminate floors, updated S/S kitchen appliances, shaker-style cabinets, centre island, stone elec fireplace, built-in hutch, den/small bedroom, dining area, walkout patio & front balcony. Upstairs: 2 generous spare beds, 4-pc shared bath, spacious laundry w/cabinetry, & large primary w/walk-in closet & 3 pc ensuite bath. Basement rec room ideal for movies or play. Upgrades: A/C, paint, flooring, light fixtures, & more. Side-by-side double garage + 2 driveway spots, & visitor parking avail. Pet-friendly! Prime spot near Hwy 1, shops, restaurants, schools (Prince Charles Elem, Clayburn Middle). Unbeatable value—see it today!
